title: Cottages and Semi-Bungalows, Design No. 209 (first and second floor plans)
creator: J. W. Lindstrom (architect/publisher)
rightsholder_or_source: Internet Archive (Public Domain Mark 1.0); originally J. W. Lindstrom, Minneapolis, 1920
research_notes: Floor-plan plate is page n10. Design No. 209, first floor 34'-0" wide; first-floor bath/bedroom in addition to second-floor bedrooms.
research_features: Compact roughly-square two-story plan (Foursquare lineage): full upper floor of bedrooms plus sewing room, lower floor with living, dining, kitchen, and deep front porch. Room dimensions labeled. Balances the bungalows with a true two-story box.
feature_highlights: first and second floor plans on one plate
first-floor bedroom and bath plus full upper floor of bedrooms
sewing room on the second floor
long open side porch drawn with posts
all rectangular rooms at right angles
supported_examples: rectangular rooms derived from walls with labels and sizes
raster underlay tracing of the blueprint
roadmap_examples: multi-floor management (stacked first and second floors)

gap_features.why: the long side porch is a roofed-but-open space drawn with posts, not a wall-enclosed room
